planned_steps.name: Pilih Customer
planned_steps.task: Pilih Customer 'AGUS SUTIKNO/PBG' pada field Customer (div[name='partner_id'] input).

planned_steps.name: Set Order Date
planned_steps.task: Set Order Date dengan tanggal saat ini (06/04/2026) pada field Order Date (div[name='date_order'] input).

planned_steps.name: Set Valid Date
planned_steps.task: Set Valid Date menjadi '14 Days' pada field Valid Date (div[name='validity_date'] input).

planned_steps.name: Klik Add a line
planned_steps.task: Klik tombol 'Add a line' pada tab Order Lines.

planned_steps.name: Pilih Type Produk
planned_steps.task: Pada wizard 'Create Product Detail', pilih Type 'OSS' pada field Type (div[name='type'] input).

planned_steps.name: Pilih Produk
planned_steps.task: Pilih Product '[25555] PortoLady GLM-8 size 36-40 @48' pada field Product (div[name='product_id'] input).

planned_steps.name: Input Quantity
planned_steps.task: Input Qty '10' pada field Quantity (div[name='product_uom_qty'] input).

planned_steps.name: Verifikasi Status Waiting Approval
planned_steps.task: Verifikasi bahwa status Customer Offer telah berubah menjadi 'Waiting Approval'.

executed_actions.description: Identified the email input field by its name attribute 'login' and filled it with the specified email address.
executed_actions.name: Login Email

executed_actions.description: The password field is identified by its id 'password' and is currently empty based on the screenshot, so it needs to be filled with 'testing-odoo19'.
executed_actions.name: Login Password

executed_actions.description: Clicking the 'Log in' button as requested. The button is identified by its text content and appears within the login form.
executed_actions.name: Click Login

executed_actions.description: Clicked on the 'Sales' module by targeting the anchor tag with class 'o_app' that contains a div with class 'o_caption' and text content 'Sales'.
executed_actions.name: Masuk Modul Sales

executed_actions.description: Clicked the 'New' button to create a new customer offer.
executed_actions.name: Klik Tombol New

executed_actions.description: The 'Customer' input field (identified by div[name="customer_id"] input) is currently empty in the screenshot, so filling it with 'AGUS SUTIKNO/PBG' and pressing enter to select the customer.
executed_actions.name: Pilih Customer

executed_actions.description: The 'Order Date' input field is identified by its parent div with name 'date_order' and the input tag itself. The screenshot shows this field is empty, so we fill it with the specified date.
executed_actions.name: Set Order Date

executed_actions.description: The task is to set the 'Valid Date' field to '14 Days'. Based on the DOM, the input field for 'Valid Date' is located within `div[name="valid_date"]` and has the id `valid_date_0`. The screenshot shows the field is currently empty and a date picker is open, so filling the value is appropriate. The hint explicitly states to use 'fill_and_enter' with '14 Days'.
executed_actions.name: Set Valid Date

executed_actions.description: Clicked the 'Add a line' button within the Order Lines section, which is typically used to add new items to a sales order or similar document.
executed_actions.name: Klik Add a line

executed_actions.description: The 'Type' field in the 'Create Product Detail' wizard already contains the value 'OSS', so no action is needed.
executed_actions.name: Pilih Type Produk

executed_actions.description: Found the 'Product' input field within the 'Create Product Detail' modal using its name attribute and filled it with the specified product name. The screenshot shows the field is currently empty, so the action is necessary.
executed_actions.name: Pilih Produk

executed_actions.description: Found the input field for 'Qty' inside a div with name 'qty_order' and filled it with '10'. The screenshot shows the current value is '0.00'.
executed_actions.name: Input Quantity

executed_actions.description: Clicked the 'Save & Close' button in the modal footer to save the product detail and close the dialog.
executed_actions.name: Klik Save & Close

executed_actions.description: Clicking the 'Confirm' button as requested. The button has text 'Confirm' and class 'btn btn-primary', and name 'action_confirm'.
executed_actions.name: Klik Confirm

executed_actions.description: Clicked the 'Ok' button within the confirmation modal to proceed.
executed_actions.name: Klik OK Konfirmasi

executed_actions.description: The current status button in the status bar for the 'state' field has the text 'Waiting Approval', confirming the status has changed as requested. The screenshot also clearly shows 'Waiting Approval' highlighted in the status bar.
executed_actions.name: Verifikasi Status Waiting Approval
